commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

Complete end-to-end implementation including:

fix: 툴팁 top-full 수정, 압력점수 컬럼명/정렬, 모바일 감지시각 너비

- 툴팁 bottom-full→top-full (아래로 표시, 클리핑 없음)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(mobile-nav): correct app.css overrides that broke desktop layout

Three bugs introduced in 08ba20d:

1. z-index calc(appbar+3) = 1103, BELOW LeftDock (1200) — TopBar
   rendered behind the dock. Fixed: calc(appbar+150) = 1250.

2. @media (max-width: 960px) hid bell/avatar on desktop viewports.
   Fixed: narrowed to 768px (phones only).

3. left: 0 !important on .mobile-nav-drawer blocked MudBlazor's
   drawer open/close animation (MudBlazor uses left property for
   slide transition). Fixed: removed left override entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix trust proxy and allowedHosts for Traefik production routing

- Enable trust proxy (1 hop) so Express correctly reads X-Forwarded-Proto
  from Traefik; req.secure becomes true for HTTPS-proxied requests, letting
  them pass through the HTTPS redirect middleware instead of being rejected
- Fix allowedHosts to use actual production domains (hbcubandhub.tech)
  instead of wrong bandhub.com entries; prevents 400 on all external traffic
- Fix compression filter to also exclude /api/v1/health and /api/v1/metrics
  paths (versioned routes were being unnecessarily compressed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: app stuck on 'verificando sesión' — robust auth session handling

- checkSession: use getSession() (localStorage, no network) instead of
  getUser() (always makes a network call) — instant load even offline
- Add try/catch/finally so authLoading is ALWAYS cleared, even on network errors
- Add 8s safety timeout as last resort fallback
- On session error: sign out silently to clear stale localStorage token
- onAuthStateChange: wrap profile fetch in try/catch; handle TOKEN_REFRESHED
  and null session events to prevent authLoading getting stuck
- handleLogin: wrap checkSession call in try/catch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix NaN loss: lower LR 3e-4→1e-4 for 2.5B model + add NaN detection

Model is actually 2.5B params (not 1.3B) due to complex-valued
architecture overhead. 3e-4 was too aggressive and caused loss to
explode after initial healthy descent. Also adds NaN/Inf detection
to skip corrupted gradient steps instead of crashing.

commit.message:
Fix idempotent replay classification for duplicate client_order_id outcomes

Duplicate client_order_id responses from Alpaca were being counted as
rejected orders and the overall run was reported as NO_ACTION. This
happened when execute_orders was retried after a post-submit crash
(e.g. the UUID serializer failure fixed in the prior commit) — the
orders had already been accepted by Alpaca on the first attempt.

Changes:
- core/execution_payload.py: add STATUS_IDEMPOTENT_REPLAY = "IDEMPOTENT_REPLAY"
- scripts/execute_alpaca_orders.py:
  - _submit_orders: duplicate branch no longer increments rejected or
    appends to rejected_reasons; instead increments duplicate_count and
    marks per-order status as "IDEMPOTENT_REPLAY"
  - _submit_orders: returns duplicate_count in summary dict
  - _new_results: initialises duplicate_count = 0
  - run_execution: three-way status assignment — EXECUTED if
    submitted_count > 0, IDEMPOTENT_REPLAY if duplicate_count > 0,
    NO_ACTION otherwise; passes duplicate_count to write_executor_audit
- core/execution_audit.py:
  - write_executor_audit: accepts duplicate_count param, persists it
  - _compute_verdict: detects IDEMPOTENT_REPLAY executor_status, sets
    execution_attempted=True, is_idempotent_replay=True, and emits a
    meaningful cash_not_deployed_reason instead of generic fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Polish & UX: carousel, pull-to-refresh, error states, dark mode (#35)

* Fix 6 contract failures: double-wrap and partial user selects

Found via new API contract test script that validates every endpoint
returns the exact JSON shape iOS expects.

Fixes:
- checkins controller: return result.data array (not {data, total})
- restaurants checkins controller: same fix
- comments author hydration: include isPrivate, followerCount,
  followingCount, postCount in select (iOS User model requires them)
- notifications actor hydration: same expanded select
- Add scripts/api-contract-test.ts that logs in, hits every endpoint,
  and validates response shapes match iOS Codable models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Exclude scripts/ from nest build to fix deploy crash

The api-contract-test.ts in scripts/ was being included in the nest
build, causing compilation failure and missing dist/main.js in prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Instagram-level speed, quality, check-in flow & video support

Performance:
- Add Nuke image caching (100MB memory + 300MB disk) with LazyImage
- Add blurhash placeholders for colored loading states
- Enable gzip compression for all API responses
- Add missing DB indexes (post.authorId, notification compound, follow reverse)
- Bump image quality: medium 1080px/q85, thumb 600px/q80, original 2048px/q92
- Add image prefetching for next 5 posts in feed scroll

Check-in flow:
- Restaurant selection is now mandatory for every post
- Rename "New Post" to "Check In" throughout (tab, nav title, buttons)
- Auto-create check-in record linked to post on creation

Video support (10s Reels-style):
- Backend: FFmpeg video processing (transcode to H.264 1080p, extract thumbnail)
- Backend: Accept video MIME types (mp4, quicktime, mov) up to 50MB
- iOS: Video selection from PhotosPicker with auto-thumbnail generation
- iOS: Auto-play muted video in feed with loop and mute toggle
- iOS: HEIC upload support (0.92 quality, fallback JPEG)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add FFmpeg to Dockerfile for video processing in production

The @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg npm package may not work on Alpine's musl libc,
so install system ffmpeg via apk as a reliable fallback.

✨ Implement complete Management Interface Suite (ItemTypes & Settings)

**New Features Implemented:**

## 🏷️ ItemTypes-Management Interface:
- ✅ **Complete CRUD Operations**: Create, Read, Update, Delete für Produktarten
- ✅ **Professional Table View**: Sortierte Liste mit Name, Beschreibung, Artikel-Anzahl
- ✅ **Smart Delete Protection**: Produktarten mit verknüpften Artikeln können nicht gelöscht werden
- ✅ **Add/Edit Modals**: Benutzerfreundliche Formulare mit Validierung
- ✅ **Admin-Only Access**: Nur Administratoren können Produktarten verwalten
- ✅ **Usage Statistics**: Zeigt Anzahl der verwendeten Artikel pro Produktart
- ✅ **Creator Information**: Anzeige wer die Produktart erstellt hat

## ⚙️ Settings-Seite mit 3 Tabs:
- ✅ **System-Einstellungen Tab** (Admin-only):
  - Organisationsname-Konfiguration
  - Standard-Prüfintervall (6/12/24/36 Monate)
  - Sprache (DE/EN) und Zeitzone-Einstellungen
  - Logo-Upload-Vorbereitung (Frontend bereit)
  - E-Mail-Benachrichtigungen Toggle

- ✅ **Profil-Einstellungen Tab** (alle Benutzer):
  - Vorname, Nachname, E-Mail bearbeiten
  - Passwort-Änderung mit Bestätigung
  - Direkte API-Integration für Profil-Updates
  - Passwort-Validierung und Error-Handling

- ✅ **System-Info Tab** (alle Benutzer):
  - Aktuelle Version (v1.2.0) und Update-Datum
  - Benutzer-Rolle und Username-Anzeige
  - Feature-Status mit grünen/gelben Badges
  - Support-Links zu GitHub Repository
  - Übersicht aller implementierten Features

**Technical Implementation:**
- ItemTypes.jsx: Vollständige Tabellen-Interface mit Modals und API-Integration
- Settings.jsx: Tab-basierte Oberfläche mit rollenbasiertem Zugriff
- State Management: Separate Zustände für Formulare, Modals und Ladezustände
- API Integration: Nutzung aller bestehenden Backend-Endpunkte
- Error Handling: Umfassende Fehlerbehandlung und Benutzer-Feedback
- Role-based Access: Korrekte Autorisierung für Admin-Funktionen

**User Experience:**
- Deutsche Lokalisierung in allen Interface-Elementen
- Konsistente Feuerwehr-Design-Sprache (fire-* Farben)
- Responsive Design für Desktop und Mobile
- Loading-States und Disabled-Zustände
- Professionelle Bestätigungsdialoge
- Intuitive Navigation zwischen Tabs

**Frontend Build:**
- Erfolgreicher Build ohne Fehler
- Alle neuen Komponenten erfolgreich kompiliert
- Bundle-Größe optimiert (782kB mit gzip 214kB)

Alle drei Haupt-Management-Interfaces sind jetzt vollständig implementiert und produktionsbereit.

Fix Electron paste via Edit>Paste menu; atomic focus-steal in osascript

Electron apps (Codex, Cursor, etc.) ignore System Events keystroke
Cmd+V after programmatic activation. Fix: use the app's own
Edit > Paste menu command via accessibility, which Electron always
honours. Native apps (Claude) keep using keystroke Cmd+V.

for atomic timing. Remove the separate JS setTimeout restore path.

feat: turn organizer into a proactive stay-on-track agent

- Proactive nudges: overdue/stale todos now actually send iMessages
  (reminder_service previously only cached them in memory)
- Scheduled check-ins: morning 8 AM, midday 1 PM, EOD Friday 4 PM PT
- Time-aware prompts: all Claude calls now include day/time context
- Snooze support: snoozed_until column + /snooze command + agent tool
- Smarter stale detection: get_overdue() and get_stale() are separate,
  both respect snoozed_until
- New iMessage commands: /done, /snooze, /focus, /w (week), /p (priority)
- Conversation memory: rolling 10-message history with 2h TTL for . commands
- Agent improvements: history param, snooze_todo + get_overdue_todos tools,
  improved executive-assistant system prompt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Click delivery dropdown directly on DOM element, not by coordinates

Coordinate-based clicks (CDP mouse.click, elementFromPoint) fail when
the View Order panel overlay covers the delivery button. Instead, find
the actual DOM element via querySelectorAll matching, then dispatch
pointer events directly on it — this works regardless of overlays
because we're targeting the element itself, not a screen position.

commit.message:
Add leaderboard page with trophy button on activity screen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(practice): fix infinite loading — real auth token + loop guard

Root causes found and fixed:

1. AUTH: 'Bearer dev-stub' hardcoded → Express auth middleware decrypts
   as JWE in production (IS_DEV=false) → 401 Unauthorized on every call.
   Fix: added /api/auth/token Next.js route (uses NextAuth getToken with
   raw=true) and practice page now fetches the real session token before
   each API call.

2. INFINITE LOOP: useEffect had `loading` as a dependency. After each
   failed attempt: loading→false triggers effect again → startSession() →
   loading→true → loading screen shown → failure → loading→false → loop.
   Fix: replaced loading dep with useRef hasAttemptedRef that is set once
   on first attempt and never resets.

3. TIMEOUT: no timeout on fetch → Render cold start (30-60s) causes
   indefinite loading spinner with no feedback.
   Fix: 30s AbortController timeout with user-friendly message.

4. DEBUG: added console.log at every step so browser DevTools shows
   exact URL, response status, response body.

Files changed:
- apps/web/app/api/auth/token/route.ts (NEW)
- apps/web/app/practice/page.tsx

us measure the real savings without a before/after deploy.

waterbodies.gpkg fabric overlay (same approach as drb_2yr configs).
